page_content:
Repeatable to: 6 credits.

DANC200 Introduction to Dance (3 Credits)

A study of dance as a form of communication and as an art form; a survey of the theories and styles of dance, and their relationships to other art forms.

DANC207 Choreography II: The Creative Process (3 Credits) Explorations in movement, music, words, objects, and environments through improvisation and choreographic problem solving. Prerequisite: DANC109.
